title: KYC holds strong in Cape Town Regatta
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Yacht Club (KYC) marked...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Yacht Club (KYC) marked a strong return to the Lipton Challenge Cup, South Africa's premier sailing regatta, securing seventh place overall and joint sixth on points in Cape Town last week.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Yacht Club (KYC) marked a strong return to the Lipton Challenge Cup, South Africa's premier sailing regatta, securing seventh place overall and joint sixth on points in Cape Town last week."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Hosted by the Royal Cape Yacht Club, the event, first heldin 1909, featured 18 top sailing clubs vying for the historic trophy donated by Thomas Lipton."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year's regatta embraced inclusivity by adopting the J22 class, making competition more accessible and blending veteran and youth sailors.","html":"This year's regatta embraced inclusivity by adopting the J22 class, making competition more accessible and blending veteran and youth sailors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The move fostered comradeship, with teams sharing set-up tips and equipment. International judge David Hudson oversaw 10 races on traditional courses, windward-leeward, equilateral triangle, and quadrilateral layouts, each at least 12 nautical miles long. With no discards, every race counted.","html":"The move fostered comradeship, with teams sharing set-up tips and equipment. International judge David Hudson oversaw 10 races on traditional courses, windward-leeward, equilateral triangle, and quadrilateral layouts, each at least 12 nautical miles long. With no discards, every race counted."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KYC's campaign, backed by community support and sponsors such as Sanlam Private Wealth, came together quickly.","html":"KYC's campaign, backed by community support and sponsors such as Sanlam Private Wealth, came together quickly."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Securing a J22 just months before, skipper Dave Shilton, trimmer Anthony Parker, and bowman Michael Hill tackled the boat's sensitive tuning demands.","html":"Securing a J22 just months before, skipper Dave Shilton, trimmer Anthony Parker, and bowman Michael Hill tackled the boat's sensitive tuning demands."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They refined rigging and teamwork mid-regatta, adapting tacking strategies with success.","html":"They refined rigging and teamwork mid-regatta, adapting tacking strategies with success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Racing was intense, with gusts over 33 knots and rough seas testing crews. KYC faced early setbacks, including a lost spinnaker and torn jib hank, but climbed to fifth by day two.","html":"Racing was intense, with gusts over 33 knots and rough seas testing crews. KYC faced early setbacks, including a lost spinnaker and torn jib hank, but climbed to fifth by day two."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"High-speed downwind runs saw competitors capsize, yet KYC's consistency kept them in the top third."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""We had little prep time, but the crew gelled fast. It was a tough, rewarding week of racing and camaraderie," said Shilton.","html":""We had little prep time, but the crew gelled fast. It was a tough, rewarding week of racing and camaraderie," said Shilton."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hermanus Yacht Club, led by Calvin Gibbs and Markus Progli, won, with Scarlet Cilliers becoming the first woman to lift the Cup. KYC, supported by OJ Grinaker and others, plans a stronger return, eyeing a second J22 for youth training.","html":"Hermanus Yacht Club, led by Calvin Gibbs and Markus Progli, won, with Scarlet Cilliers becoming the first woman to lift the Cup. KYC, supported by OJ Grinaker and others, plans a stronger return, eyeing a second J22 for youth training."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
